hero.headline: Your smartest guide to
hero.subtext: Ask about admissions, programs, deadlines, or how things generally work at UTP — you'll get an answer right away, any time of day.
hero.disclaimer: No account needed · Free to use · Always available

messages.text: Hello! I'm the UTP assistant. How can I help you today?
What are the admission requirements for Computer Science?
For Computer Science at UTP you'll need a high school diploma with a minimum GPA of 3.0, math and science scores, and to complete the entrance exam. Would you like details on the application process?
Yes, when is the next deadline?

features.title: Everything you need, instantly
features.subtitle: One place to ask anything about the university — and actually get a useful answer.

items.title: University Knowledge
items.desc: Ask about programs, courses, deadlines, or faculty — everything comes from UTP's official information.

items.title: Available 24/7
items.desc: No office hours, no queues. Ask your question whenever it comes up and get an answer straight away.

items.title: AI-Powered
items.desc: Just type your question the way you'd say it — no need to phrase things in any special way.

items.title: Reliable & Accurate
items.desc: The information comes from UTP's official sources, so you can trust what you read.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to your answer
howItWorks.subtitle: No setup. No account. Just ask.

steps.title: Open the Chat
steps.desc: Click 'Start Chatting' to open the assistant — no account needed.

steps.title: Ask Your Question
steps.desc: Type anything: admissions, schedules, programs, fees, or campus services.

steps.title: Get an Instant Answer
steps.desc: Get a clear answer in seconds, pulled from UTP's official information.

cta.title: Have a question about UTP?
cta.subtitle: It's ready when you are. Ask about programs, fees, deadlines — or whatever's on your mind.

chat.title: UTP Assistant
chat.emptySubtitle: Ask me anything about programs, admissions, fees, deadlines, or campus life.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.errorOffline: The assistant is currently offline. Please try again later.
chat.errorConnecting: Connecting to the assistant, please wait…
chat.errorBudget: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
chat.disclaimer: Answers are AI-generated and may not always be accurate. Verify important information with the university.

footer.tagline: AI-powered assistant for students and applicants at UTP.

about.title: What is the UTP ChatBot?
about.subtitle: An open-source chatbot for students, applicants, and anyone with questions about the University of Telecommunications and Post.
about.whatBody: The UTP ChatBot is a virtual assistant that draws on the university's own knowledge base. You can ask about programs, admissions, fees, schedules, and campus life — in Bulgarian or English, around the clock, no login needed.
goals: Take some pressure off administrative staff by handling the questions they answer over and over
Give students and applicants fast answers without making them wait
Let anyone check university information any time, from any device
Show how AI tools can be used practically in a university setting
about.openSourceBody: Everything is open source — if you find a bug, have an idea, or want to contribute, GitHub is the place.
